title: Lantern Market
scene: A narrow market street with hanging lanterns, awnings, stalls, side alleys, layered building fronts, and a central walkway through the scene.
midpointPrompt: A narrow market street with hanging lanterns, awnings, stalls, side alleys, layered building fronts, and a central walkway through the scene. Transitional architecture with traditional structure and clean modern details. Slightly elevated human view, not flat overhead and not fully eye-level.

xAxis.negativePrompt: medieval masonry, timber frames, small arched openings
xAxis.positivePrompt: modern structure, clean lines, glass panels, simple frames

yAxis.negativePrompt: eye-level view, grounded foreground, horizon at human height
yAxis.positivePrompt: bird's-eye view, looking down across paths and roofs

suffix: rich illustrated surface, coherent non-photographic visual study

title: Greenhouse Laboratory

midpointPrompt: A plant laboratory greenhouse with benches, labeled pots, glass walls, irrigation lines, tools, and dense greenery around a central aisle. Lightly worn surfaces with a few marks, coherent non-photographic visual study with realistic space and visible hand-rendered treatment.

xAxis.negativePrompt: clean surfaces, clear edges, no dirt buildup

yAxis.negativePrompt: soft daylight through glass, natural shadows, sunlit leaves

title: Abstract Modern Composition

midpointPrompt: An abstract modern art composition with soft curves, angled planes, layered marks, visible edges, and a balanced central structure. Moderate surface detail, neither plain nor heavily ornamented, clean illustrated rendering with ink-like edges and matte color areas.

xAxis.positivePrompt: ornate surfaces, decorative details, carved repeated motifs

title: Library Reading Room
